title: erigeron eradiatus
intro: Erigeron eradiatus, also known as Beach Fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is native to coastal regions of western North America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to soothe and calm the skin and respiratory system. Beach Fleabane can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy for those in need.
